prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a lone astronaut standing on a rocky ledge and facing away from the camera, looking out across an immense red desert plain on a Mars-like planet. The astronaut is centered in the lower middle of the frame, wearing a realistic white EVA spacesuit with subtle gray panels, a life-support backpack, heavy boots, and dark gloves; the helmet is not visible from the front because the figure is seen from behind. The landscape is vast and barren, covered in rust-red dust, scattered stones, and low rock formations, with a rugged cliff edge on the left foreground, sparse rocky mounds across the middle distance, and hazy mountain ranges stretching along the far horizon. Use soft warm peach and terracotta tones, thin atmospheric haze, and gentle late-afternoon light that casts a long shadow behind the astronaut’s feet. The mood is solitary, awe-filled, and exploratory, like the opening frame of a sci-fi film about first contact with an alien world. Photorealistic, high detail, ultra-wide composition, natural cinematic color grading, epic scale, minimalism, no buildings, no vehicles, no text, no HUD, no other people.
